props.name: marqueeText
props.description: The text to display in the curved marquee

props.name: speed
props.description: Animation speed of the marquee text

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class name for styling the text

props.name: curveAmount
props.description: Amount of curve in the text path

props.name: interactive
props.description: Whether the marquee can be dragged by the user
